title: Reset Your Future: Career Discovery
description: A comprehensive program to help you discover your career path and develop essential skills for the modern job market.

modules.title: Introduction to Career Planning
modules.description: Learn the fundamentals of career planning and self-assessment.

lessons.title: Understanding Your Values
lessons.content:
# Understanding Your Values

Your values are the foundation of a fulfilling career. In this lesson, we'll explore:

## What are Values?

Values are the principles and beliefs that guide your decisions and behavior. They represent what's truly important to you.

## Why Values Matter in Career Planning

1. **Job Satisfaction**: When your work aligns with your values, you feel more fulfilled.
2. **Decision Making**: Values help you make difficult career choices.
3. **Motivation**: Working in alignment with your values increases intrinsic motivation.

## Exercise: Identify Your Top 5 Values

Take a moment to reflect on what matters most to you. Consider areas like:
- Family and relationships
- Financial security
- Creativity and innovation
- Helping others
- Personal growth
- Work-life balance

modules.title: Skills Assessment
modules.description: Identify and evaluate your current skills and competencies.

lessons.title: Transferable Skills
lessons.content:
# Transferable Skills

Transferable skills are abilities you can use in any job or industry.

## Common Transferable Skills

- **Communication**: Writing, speaking, presenting
- **Leadership**: Managing projects, mentoring others
- **Problem Solving**: Analytical thinking, creativity
- **Organization**: Time management, planning
- **Technology**: Digital literacy, software proficiency

## How to Identify Your Transferable Skills

1. Review your past experiences (work, education, volunteering)
2. List the tasks you performed
3. Identify the underlying skills used
4. Match these to potential career paths
